title: Media representations of class, gender, ethnicity, and age groups
summary: 9699 — stereotypes, counter-types, and ideological representations in media content.
learningObjectives: Explain how class, gender, ethnicity, and age are portrayed.
Apply content analysis to media examples.

simpleExplanation.title: What the media shows — and hides
simpleExplanation.summary: Media often reinforce stereotypes but can also challenge them; representation shapes how groups are seen and see themselves.

sections.content: **Media representations** (10.1) links **1.3 identity** to **9.2 theory**. Use **Trowler**, **Van Zoonen**, **Hooks**.
